full_text:
Zhang Xiang 張象
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Xiang (張象). Wu Leader of the Van who surrendered to Jin. Zhang Xiang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
